analysis.name: Popcat
analysis.summary: POPCAT是Solana上的猫主题Meme币，近期价格在0.044美元附近震荡，24小时跌3.37%，7日涨3.56%。市值约4355万美元，流动性约286万美元。历史最高2.05美元，现价较ATH跌97.8%。新闻方面多为旧闻或教程，缺乏近期重大利好。市场情绪中性偏空，成交量一般。风险极高，不建议买入。

recommendation.invalidation: 无买入逻辑，无需设置失效条件

profile.name: Popcat
profile.description: Pop Cat refers to a series of videos in which using an image of a cat named Oatmeal, the cat is photoshopped as if it's opening its mouth wide in an O shape.
